human_review_rationale: Ecolab is the strongest of the five rotation-backfill first-time baselines. Published 87.4 overstated but not by as much as peers (State Street -32.3, Nucor -21.0, Abbott -29.6, Microsoft -21.4). SYS 81.3 legitimately Exemplary. Recommend human review but confidence high.
